commands.name: COMMENT
commands.description: Output diagnostic comments into the execution pipeline logs.

commands.name: CREATE
commands.description: Write a brand new code record node in the specified sandbox path location.

commands.name: REPLACE
commands.description: Perform precise line or block search-and-replace modification inside a sandbox file record.

commands.name: DELETE
commands.description: Purge the specified virtual code record from the active sandbox.
